title: bihai distans
intro: Bihai distans, also known as Sichuan lovage, is a perennial plant native to China, belonging to the Apiaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to warm the body, dispel cold and dampness, and relieve digestive issues. The health benefits of Bihai distans include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and fever, as well as its ability to promote digestion and relieve menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Bihai distans include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be made by boiling the roots or leaves in water, and are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
